tasks.label: Build Meridian (VS 2026)
tasks.command: if not defined VCPKG_ROOT if exist "${workspaceFolder}\..\vcpkg\scripts\buildsystems\vcpkg.cmake" set "VCPKG_ROOT=${workspaceFolder}\..\vcpkg" && if not defined VCPKG_ROOT (echo VCPKG_ROOT is not set and no sibling vcpkg checkout was found. && exit /b 1) && if not exist "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" (echo vswhere.exe not found. && exit /b 1) && for /f "usebackq delims=" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.VisualStudio.Component.VC.Tools.x86.x64 -property installationPath`) do call "%i\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvars64.bat" >nul && cmake --preset vs2026-debug && cmake --build --preset vs2026-debug

tasks.label: Build Meridian (VS Code Clang)
tasks.command: if not defined VCPKG_ROOT if exist "${workspaceFolder}\..\vcpkg\scripts\buildsystems\vcpkg.cmake" set "VCPKG_ROOT=${workspaceFolder}\..\vcpkg" && if not defined VCPKG_ROOT (echo VCPKG_ROOT is not set and no sibling vcpkg checkout was found. && exit /b 1) && if not exist "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" (echo vswhere.exe not found. && exit /b 1) && for /f "usebackq delims=" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.VisualStudio.Component.VC.Tools.x86.x64 -property installationPath`) do call "%i\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvars64.bat" >nul && if exist "%ProgramFiles%\LLVM\bin\clang-cl.exe" set "PATH=%ProgramFiles%\LLVM\bin;%PATH%" && cmake --preset vscode-clang-debug && cmake --build --preset vscode-clang-debug

tasks.label: Open Tracy Profiler (VS 2026)
tasks.command: if not exist "${input:tracyProfilerPath}" (echo tracy-profiler.exe was not found at the selected path. Update the path prompt to point at your Tracy viewer executable. && exit /b 1) && start "Tracy Profiler" "${input:tracyProfilerPath}"

inputs.description: Path to the Tracy viewer executable
